# p6 · README Reconstruction `[docs]`

*Replace a bloated autogenerated README with a tight one*

## Prompt

```
Rewrite the following README. Constraints:

- Maximum 200 words total
- Audience: [describe your audience, e.g. "backend engineers who already know Python"]
- Include only: what it does (1 sentence), how to install (minimal), one usage example
- Remove: badges, motivation sections, philosophy, contribution guides, license section, feature lists
- Plain prose, no bullet lists

[PASTE README HERE]
```

## Usage

Set the word limit before generating — the model will pad to fill whatever space you leave it.
